creator: karels@freebsd.org
text: Conrad, you said there wasn't consensus, but didn't otherwise comment.  I should have included you as supporting the change; I thought that was obvious.  I didn't count those who didn't reply specifically one way or the other.  John and Garance both said that they favored reversion.  In any case, that discussion is over, and I stand by my conclusion that there is consensus.  I'm not going to argue it any more in this bug.
